steps.title: Recognize the period of sine
steps.content: Sine is periodic with period $2\pi$, so $\sin(18\pi) = \sin(18\pi \bmod 2\pi)$. To find the remainder when $18\pi$ is divided by $2\pi$: $$\frac{18\pi}{2\pi} = 9$$ Since this division is exact, $18\pi \bmod 2\pi = 0$.

steps.title: Evaluate sin(0)
steps.content: $\sin(18\pi) = \sin(0) = 0$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
